sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 52 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.100/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.12.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Learned counsel states that the question framed for determination has already been decided against the applicant vide order reported as 2022 SCMR 1104 (Commissioner of Income Tax (Legal) v. Askari Bank Limited & Others). In view hereof, the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
